display_description: Fetches and parses notebooks, sample codes, models, and articles from OpenVINO GitHub, ModelScope AI PC zone, and CSDN Intel Developer Zone.
detail_describe: A skill to fetch, parse, and structure content from multiple online sources (OpenVINO GitHub, ModelScope, CSDN) for student recommendation and bot training. It runs locally and supports offline fallbacks.
name: openvino-content-fetch
use_cases: Fetch and parse OpenVINO notebooks for student recommendation
Gather ModelScope AI PC zone updates, skills, and models
Retrieve CSDN Intel Developer Zone articles for learning content
author: Zhuo
